DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SAE SOHN, MARCELLE CEDARS, THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF PENNA DEKELAITA'S 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IN HER 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Courtney Cassinelli of AGS (576.1500) for plaintiff and responding party; Becky Cachia-Riedl of Hassard Bonnington LLP (288.9800) for defendants and moving parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Overruled. Plaintiff adequately alleges a cause of action for medical battery based on conditional consent. The sham pleading doctrine is not a bar to this claim. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SAE SOHN, THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IN HER COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Becky Cachia-Riedl of Hassard Bonnington, LLP (288.9800) for defendants and moving parties; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the third cause of action for battery. Plaintiff has not alleged that defendants deliberately attempted to deviate from the consent given or that defendants intentionally violated a condition of providing treatment. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
